name: PPAP
description: Predict binding free energy (ΔG) and dissociation constant (Kd). Batch process multiple protein-protein complexes. Uses ESM2-3B embeddings and graph neural networks.
capabilities: Predict binding free energy (ΔG) and dissociation constant (Kd)
Uses ESM2-3B embeddings and graph neural networks

complex_structure.description: Protein-protein complex structure in PDB format

chain_a.description: Chain ID of the first protein

chain_b.description: Chain ID of the second protein
